verses.text: Korah, Dathan, and Abiram rise against Moses and Aaron. Rebellion. They covet the priesthood.
Korah, Dathan, and Abiram rise against Moses and Aaron. Rebellion. They covet the priesthood.
Korah, Dathan, and Abiram rise against Moses and Aaron. Rebellion. They covet the priesthood.
Moses bids them bring censers; God will show whom He chooses. The test. God will decide.
Moses bids them bring censers; God will show whom He chooses. The test. God will decide.
Moses bids them bring censers; God will show whom He chooses. The test. God will decide.
Moses bids them bring censers; God will show whom He chooses. The test. God will decide.
He warns the Levites they seek too much. Too much. Discontent grasps at more.
He warns the Levites they seek too much. Too much. Discontent grasps at more.
He warns the Levites they seek too much. Too much. Discontent grasps at more.
He warns the Levites they seek too much. Too much. Discontent grasps at more.
Dathan and Abiram refuse to come, accusing Moses. Defiance. They scorn his leadership.
Dathan and Abiram refuse to come, accusing Moses. Defiance. They scorn his leadership.
Dathan and Abiram refuse to come, accusing Moses. Defiance. They scorn his leadership.
Moses is wroth; the congregation gathers at the tent. Gathered. The matter comes to a head.
Moses is wroth; the congregation gathers at the tent. Gathered. The matter comes to a head.
Moses is wroth; the congregation gathers at the tent. Gathered. The matter comes to a head.
Moses is wroth; the congregation gathers at the tent. Gathered. The matter comes to a head.
Moses is wroth; the congregation gathers at the tent. Gathered. The matter comes to a head.
God would consume all; Moses and Aaron plead for the congregation. Intercession. The few plead for the many.
God would consume all; Moses and Aaron plead for the congregation. Intercession. The few plead for the many.
God would consume all; Moses and Aaron plead for the congregation. Intercession. The few plead for the many.
The people depart from the tents of the rebels. Separate. The wise flee from sin's company.
The people depart from the tents of the rebels. Separate. The wise flee from sin's company.
The people depart from the tents of the rebels. Separate. The wise flee from sin's company.
The people depart from the tents of the rebels. Separate. The wise flee from sin's company.
The people depart from the tents of the rebels. Separate. The wise flee from sin's company.
Moses says the earth shall swallow them if God sent him. The sign. God will prove His servant.
Moses says the earth shall swallow them if God sent him. The sign. God will prove His servant.
Moses says the earth shall swallow them if God sent him. The sign. God will prove His servant.
The ground opens and swallows them alive. Swallowed. Rebellion meets sudden judgment.
The ground opens and swallows them alive. Swallowed. Rebellion meets sudden judgment.
The ground opens and swallows them alive. Swallowed. Rebellion meets sudden judgment.
Fire consumes the two hundred fifty who offered incense. Fire. The presumptuous priests perish.
Fire consumes the two hundred fifty who offered incense. Fire. The presumptuous priests perish.
Their censers are made plates for the altar, a memorial. Memorial. A warning is kept before all.
Their censers are made plates for the altar, a memorial. Memorial. A warning is kept before all.
Their censers are made plates for the altar, a memorial. Memorial. A warning is kept before all.
Their censers are made plates for the altar, a memorial. Memorial. A warning is kept before all.
Their censers are made plates for the altar, a memorial. Memorial. A warning is kept before all.
The next day the people murmur again; the glory appears. Again. Hearts are slow to learn.
The next day the people murmur again; the glory appears. Again. Hearts are slow to learn.
The next day the people murmur again; the glory appears. Again. Hearts are slow to learn.
The next day the people murmur again; the glory appears. Again. Hearts are slow to learn.
The next day the people murmur again; the glory appears. Again. Hearts are slow to learn.
A plague breaks out; Aaron's incense stays it. Atonement. The priest stands between the dead and the living.
A plague breaks out; Aaron's incense stays it. Atonement. The priest stands between the dead and the living.
A plague breaks out; Aaron's incense stays it. Atonement. The priest stands between the dead and the living.
